description: SOC 2 Trust Service Criteria mapped to M365 assessment checks. Simplified for SMB and MSP engagements. Focus on the CC (Common Criteria) series most relevant to cloud service configurations.

CC1.1.title: COSO Principle 1 — Integrity and Ethical Values
CC1.1.evidence: Password protection policies, banned passwords, self-service password reset configuration, authentication methods policy

CC6.1.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls — Authentication
CC6.1.evidence: MFA enrollment percentage, Conditional Access policies requiring MFA, sign-in risk policies, Identity Protection configuration

CC6.2.title: User Provisioning and Deprovisioning
CC6.2.evidence: Stale/dormant account list (no sign-in >X days), pending guest invitations, guest account age, offboarding hygiene

CC6.3.title: Role-Based Access and Least Privilege
CC6.3.evidence: Global Administrator count, permanent vs. eligible role assignments, PIM configuration, privileged service principals

CC6.6.title: Security Against Threats and Vulnerabilities from External Sources
CC6.6.evidence: Anti-phishing policies, Safe Links, Safe Attachments, Defender for Office 365 preset policies, external forwarding rules

CC6.7.title: Data Transmission and Storage Protection
CC6.7.evidence: Device encryption status (BitLocker/FileVault), connector TLS enforcement, external mail forwarding rules, DMARC/DKIM records

CC6.8.title: Endpoint Security and Device Compliance
CC6.8.evidence: Intune device compliance percentage, compliance policies, App Protection (MAM) policies, stale device count

CC7.1.title: Detection and Monitoring of Security Events
CC7.1.evidence: Identity Protection risky user detections, Defender alerts configuration, audit log retention, monitoring coverage

CC7.2.title: Incident Response and Communication
CC7.2.evidence: Open security alerts by severity and age, active security incidents, automated investigation activity, response SLA evidence

CC7.3.title: Vulnerability Identification and Remediation
CC7.3.evidence: Microsoft Secure Score and top improvement actions, Windows Update compliance, OS version currency, patch ring configuration

CC8.1.title: Change Management Controls
CC8.1.evidence: Security baseline deployment status, device configuration profiles, unassigned or missing critical profiles

coverage_calculation: Number of controls with at least one passing check / total mapped controls × 100

scoring.note: CC6.1 (MFA) and CC6.3 (Privileged Access) are typically gate controls for SOC 2 audit readiness
